appliedUpdates.description: Created user-testing.md with testing knowledge including test credentials, PowerShell quirks, and API request formats
Updated validation-state.json with passed status for all 14 backend permission assertions

VAL-BACKEND-001.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/books with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-002.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X PUT /api/v1/books/:id with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-003.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X DELETE /api/v1/books/:id with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-004.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/books/:id/copies with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-005.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X GET /reports/dashboard, /reports/charts/categories, /reports/activity all returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-006.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/fines/:id/pay with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-007.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/fines/:id/waive with admin token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-008.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/books with librarian token returned 201 Created

VAL-BACKEND-009.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X PUT /api/v1/books/:id with librarian token returned 200 OK

VAL-BACKEND-010.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/books/:id/copies with librarian token returned 201 Created

VAL-BACKEND-011.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X GET /reports/dashboard, /reports/charts/categories, /reports/activity all returned 200 OK with valid JSON data

VAL-BACKEND-012.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/fines/:id/pay with librarian token returned 200 OK

VAL-BACKEND-013.evidence: curl.exe -s -w HTTP_CODE -X POST /api/v1/fines/:id/waive with librarian token returned 403 FORBIDDEN

VAL-BACKEND-014.description: Super Admin Access Granted on All Endpoints
VAL-BACKEND-014.evidence: All tested endpoints returned success: POST /books (201), PUT /books/:id (200), DELETE /books/:id (200), GET /reports/dashboard (200), POST /fines/:id/pay (200), POST /fines/:id/waive (200)
